alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions in strategy and operations; Commercial Operations experience translatable to Revenue Operations (territory budgets, CRM administration, forecasting, pricing execution, revenue-leakage control).
Scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs at Google; designs and directs LLM coding agents for production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking, and calibration.
Proficient SQL with BigQuery queries, advanced Excel and Sheets, Looker dashboard building, Tableau; writes queries to pull and shape own data; basic Python actively learning for data analysis.
alignments.job_requirement: Data and analytics capability (typical RevOps scope)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Salesforce admin experience; managed territory budgets and partnered with engineering on feature requests.
